summary_en: Ward 1 Council candidate Jackie Reyes-Yanes is calling for urgent action in response to a recent surge in gun violence, highlighting alarming data, including 23 shootings and 2 homicides in just one month. Speaking at community events during National Youth Violence Prevention Week, she outlined a concrete safety plan focused on immediate intervention, community-based solutions, and stronger coordination to address public safety concerns and protect residents.
summary_es: La candidata al Concejo del Ward 1, Jackie Reyes-Yanes, exige acción urgente frente al reciente aumento de la violencia armada, señalando cifras alarmantes, 23 tiroteos y 2 homicidios en tan solo un mes. Durante eventos comunitarios en el marco de la Semana Nacional de Prevención de la Violencia Juvenil, presentó un plan de seguridad concreto enfocado en intervención inmediata, soluciones comunitarias y una mejor coordinación institucional para proteger a los residentes.
title_en: Ward 1 Candidate Jackie Reyes-Yanes Demands Action on Gun Violence Surge, Outlines Concrete Safety Plan
title_es: Candidata del Ward 1 Jackie Reyes-Yanes Exige Acción Ante el Aumento de la Violencia Armada y Presenta un Plan de Seguridad Concreto
